command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.203 '
echo === VM-ECOSYSTEM PHASE D VALIDATION ===

echo --- IDENTITY ---
hostname && whoami && id

echo --- IP ---
ip addr show ens33 | grep inet

echo --- REPO STATE ---
cd /opt/moreno-ai
git log --oneline -3
git remote -v | head -2
git status | head -3

echo --- RUNTIME VALIDATION ---
python3 runtime/agent_identity_loader.py --validate all 2>&1 | tail -6
python3 runtime/environment_runtime.py --clock 2>&1 | tail -4

echo --- AUDIT RECORDS ---
ls /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/ | wc -l

echo --- DNS ---
cat /etc/resolv.conf

echo --- TIME ---
timedatectl | grep -E "Local time|synchronized"

echo ALL_VALIDATED
' 2>&1
